Chris

subject: An important request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|

Peter,

This is it. It's the last day of 2015.

This is important because just weeks after the new year begins, voters will head to the polls to begin choosing our next President. The first vote will be in Iowa on February 1st.

Today is our opportunity to not only cap off an incredible year, but to ensure that we have the resources to lay the final groundwork in early-voting states like Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

That means keeping our TV ads on the air, and bolstering our grassroots infrastructure and Get-Out-The-Vote Operation that is absolutely critical to our success moving forward.

**You've signed up to join me, but our records show that you haven't yet donated online.

[I'd like to personally ask you to commit to my campaign by donating just $4 right now. Before the clock runs out on 2015, I ask you to become an official Q4 donor.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32604149:WKZOkfyGN:m:1:876315805:0669F2788FAF780B108CD23983BB0AA6:r)

Once you donate, we'll send you an official Ben Carson for President bumper sticker.** | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32604149:WKZOkfyGN:m:1:876315805:0669F2788FAF780B108CD23983BB0AA6:r)
---
I've lived a blessed life and had an incredible career. Running for President was never on my bucket list. But I believe our country's future is threatened. I believe, for the sake of my children and grandchildren, that it is worth saving.

And so I've decided to do everything in my power to help right the ship.

I'm ready to lead a revival of our nation and ensure that power once again resides in the hands of "We the People." That is my mission.

**[Please, before midnight tonight, make a secure donation of just $4. It may not sound like a lot, but it will go a long way.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32604149:WKZOkfyGN:m:1:876315805:0669F2788FAF780B108CD23983BB0AA6:r)**

I don't accept money from billionaires and special-interest groups who want to influence me, because I will not be bought and paid for. This campaign is funded by hundreds of thousands of everyday, hardworking Americans just $5 and $10 at a time -- exactly how it should be.

[**Thank you, and I hope I can count on your support before midnight tonight.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32604149:WKZOkfyGN:m:1:876315805:0669F2788FAF780B108CD23983BB0AA6:r)
Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Dear Patriot:
Today is the biggest day my campaign has seen
yet.
With the FEC's End of Year Fundraising
Deadline rapidly approaching, can I count on you to please go
"all in" with your most generous contribution right away?
I need all hands on deck.
My staff and I are preparing an all-out
campaign blitz in key early states for the final month of this
campaign.
With the Senate vote on Audit the Fed on
January 12, two final debates before voting begins and the Iowa
Caucuses rapidly approaching on February 1, this fundraising
deadline could not be more important.
>> $15 MONEYBOMB >>
>> $25 MONEYBOMB >>
>> $50 MONEYBOMB >>
>> $75 MONEYBOMB >>
From the very beginning, I've built my
campaign with an eye on this final month.
History has shown us that polls six, three
and even one month out from voting are worthless.
What matters is right now.
Right now is when voters start to make up
their minds. Right now is when door-knocking, phone calls,
campaign stops and TV ads all matter.
Right now is our moment.
I'm "all in."
Are you?
Please agree to your most generous
contribution right away to my campaign's End of Year Money Bomb.
There's no time to waste.
In liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: An important challenge for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
Raising money is one of the worst parts of having to run for office in this country. The outrageous sums it takes to run and win elections in the United States is one of the reasons Congress doesn't regulate corporate America, but corporate America regulates Congress.
I am proud of the way our campaign has raised money. You should be too. We don't have a super PAC, and I am not relying on millionaires and billionaires for money. This campaign is funded by over 2 million individual contributions made by working Americans who have had enough of the billionaire class buying our elections.
Tonight, our campaign faces an important challenge -- the final FEC fundraising deadline of the year. So, I need to just come right out and ask directly:
[**Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before tonight's midnight FEC fundraising deadline?**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28e5/43f17890/495ca0d1/620d6af0/1689081379/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-campaign?refcode=em151231am-v4-full")
If we do well, we have a chance to send an unmistakable message about the size of our grassroots campaign, and our ability to win the Democratic primary, the White House, and to reclaim our democracy from the billionaire class.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

name: Katherine Van Hollen
subject: The Political World Is Watching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend,

As Chris stated in his early New Year's resolution, he is going to avoid sending you emails with the overheated, red-meat rhetoric that many other campaigns seem to love. Those campaigns use that rhetoric because they believe people will only contribute in response to screaming headlines and cataclysmic claims. We don't believe that, and I hope you will help us prove them wrong.

But the fact is that the political world will be watching how much money our campaign is able to raise by midnight tonight.

That is because at the end of each quarter, candidates must disclose how much they have raised; and the fourth and final quarter of 2015 will determine how we start the 2016 election year.

_[**That 's why if you are able to give before midnight tonight, it will make a big difference. One of the most important issues to me -- particularly as a mom to a daughter –- is equal rights for women and girls. There’s no one on earth who fights harder for that goal than my mom.

Women voters will decide the outcome of this election, and we need my mom in the White House. **[This is your last chance to become a founding donor of Women for Hillary. Friend -
This is what a political revolution looks like: working Americans coming together to say they have had ENOUGH of the influence of a billionaire class buying elections to enrich themselves while everyone else gets poorer.
Take a look at the response from earlier today to Bernie's email -- [**all real contributions from people helping us reach our deadline goal.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28d3/43f17890/49ab07ee/620d57d1/2025420469/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-campaign?refcode=em151231pm-gif-full")

In solidarity,
Team Bernie

body:
Dear Patriot,

The Senate vote on Audit the Fed is a huge
moment for all of us.

Not sure if you saw this earlier email from
Rep. Massie, but the video he shared from Ron Paul explains
exactly how important this December 31st fundraising deadline
will be to our Audit the Fed vote that we've been working years
to secure. You should watch.

We know that the Fed will go on the defense
to destroy Rand. That's because he's the only one that threatens
their authority.

No other candidate is as dedicated to
exposing the corruption and ending the Washington machine.

The Federal Reserve will do anything they can
to maintain their unconstitutional authority.But they can't fight
us off forever. And they know it.

The Liberty movement rallying around Rand is
their worst nightmare.

Don't you want to prove why it should be?

Our end-of-year moneybomb can. We can show
them all that this movement is rallied around a strong leader for
Liberty.

You can bet the Federal Reserve will be
looking over the FEC reports after December 31st deadline -- and
the Senators that have to vote on Audit the Fed on January 12th?
They'll be looking too.

They should know how much we Stand with Rand
-- and why they should too.

Please watch Ron's video and chip in whatever
you can today.

The destructive reign of the Federal Reserve
will come to an end if we work together.

In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: 1 million people by midnight? It's not impossible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Bernie Supporters -
We are just short of a real campaign milestone, and one that you can help us hit ahead of our official campaign finance deadline tonight.
You know that we have had more than two million individual contributions to our campaign -- but we are on the cusp of an even bigger milestone.
**Right now,_nearly one million people_ own a piece of our campaign by making a donation. It's a huge number, and if we can cross that threshold it will show the unprecedented size of our movement -- but we need to reach it by midnight tonight.**
Our records indicate that this email address has yet to make a contribution to our campaign. If you have given using another email address, or have done so offline, then thank you. But if you haven't, there's absolutely no better time than right now to make a $3 contribution to help push us past that one million milestone.
[**Make a $3 contribution today to help us reach our goal of one million individual donors by midnight tonight.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28c0/43f17890/49e40eed/620d54b1/3176020162/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-campaign?refcode=em151231donors-non")
[Donate $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28c0/43f17890/49e40eed/620d54b1/3176020162/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-campaign?refcode=em151231donors-non")
In his first historic presidential campaign, Barack Obama didn't hit this mark until well after the Iowa caucuses. We are on the verge of another unprecedented achievement -- one that would be impossible to ignore.
Thanks for standing with Bernie.
In solidarity,
Bernie 2016

name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: Before the ball drops...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Here is some very good news. A number of supporters have told us that -- within the legal limits -- they will match any contributions you make before midnight tonight.

So please -- before the ball drops and the new year begins -- consider making a contribution. Its value will be doubled by the match.

**[You can use this special link to make your contribution right away.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c16/70cdc2ba/47b918c6/39647b3/2779851936/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?refcode=em123115_1&amount=25.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+You+can+use+this+special+link+to+make+yo&utm_campaign=em12312015_2&source=em12312015_2")**

As Katherine wrote you earlier today, the world will be watching closely to see whether we raise the funds before midnight to fight back against the outside SuperPac that is right now spending $1 million against us. They saw the polls showing us ahead, and they are trying to stop our progress. Please help us fight back before the ball drops and let us end the year with a good financial showing.

[**Click here and rush a donation >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c16/70cdc2ba/47b918c6/39647b0/2779851936/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?refcode=em123115_1&amount=25.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+and+rush+a+donation+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em12312015_2&source=em12312015_2")

I continue to regret the great pressure our political system places on the need for fundraising. I will continue to work every day to change that broken system. But I can't fix it without being in the Senate. And I need your help to get there. That means talking to your friends and neighbors about what is at stake in this election. And it means whatever financial help you can provide at this critical moment.

Many thanks and wishing you a very Happy New Year!

Chris

Sent from my iPad
